# misp_tag (Data Source)

Look up a MISP tag by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "misp_tag" "tlp_red" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Numeric tag id.

### Read-Only

- `colour` (String)
- `exportable` (Boolean)
- `hide_tag` (Boolean)
- `local_only` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `numerical_value` (Number)
- `org_id` (String)
- `user_id` (String)
